text.message: i don't know how red got that spot, but ouch
ok, i guess you didnt haha
i'll have the weakest set up and end up losing this game horibbly
Ok, I should never buy stocks, I can't predict this at all
lol ok how did green pass it up twice
why not just ask to not get robbed, it could work
thats fair haha, it was the card I stole from red, that's karma
sure, but it is also extortion
That’s besides the point if you agree
Negging on a deal is inexcusable
And you know that was bs too
give me a card or i rob you isnt a threat?
do what you gotta do man, its your game
No, you changed what I said to support you point
what did i say you said?
yeah, the card was a brick, you wanted him to give a brick to you
And he left like a coward
red, if i hadnt agreed would you have robbed me?
That’s ok, I don’t think you would
like youre trying to teach me a lesson but my brain is too mushy
green would be doing pretty well if they were still here
If your aunt had a penis she’d be your uncle
its cool, you actually have a decent game
You should’ve stayed asleep, computer was playing better
For telling you to get your sleep?
it is a game, we play those to have fun
I’d argue there’s more pride in soloing a bot than a person
feelings are hard, im not sure if oj and i are friends or if we hate each other
Who said it was one or the other
I know I’m just offering so that it looks like I’m doing something
So that I don’t get kicked for inactivity
i was gonna move the robber too
i was gonna be so nice
green, if you ever want wood for brick i wlll always do that
so red has officially locked army
green going to city this turn
Then we can all move on
i think we bought all the vps already
i guess the long term plan is give orange 4 roads to the settle
oj wins with road abnd 2 vps
do you not have a vp green?
it feels like you have a vp buddy
